positive: A minimalist and whimsical scene featuring a group of anthropomorphic woodland creatures (foxes, bears, rabbits) engaged in a gentle, harmonious gathering under a stylized, bioluminescent crescent moon. The composition should be centered, showing clear silhouettes of the characters interacting with stylized flora like oversized glowing mushrooms and ferns. Use a sophisticated blend of deep sapphire blues, midnight teals, and accents of glowing emerald and amber. The artwork style must be highly detailed, vector-illustration quality, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Strong contrast is paramount, emphasizing sharp lines and clean edges. Composition should be circular and balanced, with negative space effectively framing the main action. Perfect for DTG printing.
negative: blurry, noisy, grainy, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, low resolution, photorealistic, jpeg artifacts, disfigured
